hooks.command: echo 'levihuff.net: run npm test before claiming any change done. Build-critical edits (src/, test/, eleventy.config.cjs, tailwind.config.js, package.json) trigger the test hook automatically. See CLAUDE.md and AGENT_CONFIG.md.'

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && [ -d vault/wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^vault/wiki/' && echo 'VAULT_CHANGED: vault/wiki/ was modified this session. Update vault/wiki/hot.md (under 500 words: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads) and vault/wiki/index.md if new pages were added. Overwrite hot.md completely, it is a cache, not a journal.' || true
